message:
Add real MCP integration tests with server-everything

Tests connect to @modelcontextprotocol/server-everything via real stdio
transport, exercising tool discovery, echo, get-sum, get-tiny-image
(non-text content marshaling), env variable passing, and annotated
messages. Skips when npx is not available.

Also fixes MCP tool name sanitization: hyphens in MCP tool names are
replaced with underscores to satisfy LLM provider name constraints,
while preserving original names for CallTool back to the MCP server.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
